findings.title: Broker chain reaches privileged-action semantics but omits final proof
findings.statement: Attacker-controlled renderer content reaches disclosure, write primitive, reuse pivot, broker escape, and privileged-action semantics, but the session never captures the broker-owned proof artifact required to prove the final action beyond userland compromise.

evidence.summary: gdb plus strace confirm renderer leak, write primitive, broker escape, and privileged-action semantics with no broker-owned proof artifact
